# JC Brick & Blocklaying

JC Brick & Blocklaying is a bricklayer and masonry specialist based in Mooroolbark, serving Melbourne's eastern suburbs.

## Services

- Outdoor Fireplaces & Pizza Ovens: Custom outdoor fireplaces and pizza ovens, full supply and install, across Melbourne's east and Yarra Valley.
- Block Retaining & Dividing Walls: Structural retaining and dividing walls with concrete core fill and steel reinforcement.
- Remedial Brickwork & Crack Stitching: Specialist crack stitching, dampcourse rectification, and mortar reinstatement.
- Custom Mortar Matching: 80 custom mortar colours for exact heritage and restoration matching across Melbourne.
- Heritage Restoration, Feature Walls, Front Fences, Brick Extensions and Architectural Brickwork.

## Service Areas

Croydon, Croydon North, Croydon Hills, Mooroolbark, Mount Evelyn, Ringwood, Ringwood North, Bayswater, Blackburn, Chirnside Park, Doncaster, Balwyn, Kilsyth, Lilydale, Mitcham, Vermont, Wantirna, Healesville, Warranwood, Boronia, Ferntree Gully, Knox, Scoresby

## Credentials

- 21 years of experience
- Fully insured
- Top 1% — Quality Business Awards 2026 (Maroondah Region)
- ABN: 95 667 976 963
- 5.0 star Google rating — 15 reviews
